title: How LLMs Tokenize
description: Your LLM doesn't read words — it reads fragments called tokens. That invisible step shapes cost, reasoning, and accuracy. Understand it fully, interactively.

title: LLM Agent Anatomy
description: A bare LLM answers once and stops. An agent reasons, picks tools, observes results, and loops — until the task is done. The full ReAct loop, visualized.

title: Forecasting Explained
description: What actually happens when a model reads your data and draws a line into the future. Trend, seasonality, noise, ruptures — visualized.

title: RAG Under the Hood
description: How Retrieval-Augmented Generation actually works: chunking, embeddings, vector search, reranking, and generation — step by step, visualized.

title: The Embedding Space
description: How a model turns words into numbers — and why the geometry of that space is the foundation of all modern AI. Visualized, interactive.

title: Attention, Visualized
description: What the attention mechanism actually does — Query, Key, Value explained intuitively, with an interactive heatmap you can explore token by token.

title: How a Model Learns
description: Loss landscapes, gradient descent, backpropagation — why a neural network improves with every step, visualized interactively.

title: Streamlit Under the Hood
description: What really happens when you run a Streamlit app — the execution model, re-runs, session state, caching, and how it compares to React.

title: Overfitting & Regularization
description: Why models memorize instead of learn — and how regularization, dropout, and early stopping fix it. Bias-variance trade-off, visualized interactively.

title: The Transformer Architecture
description: Every modern LLM is built on one 2017 paper. Here is the full architecture — self-attention, multi-head attention, encoder vs decoder — block by block, interactive.

title: Fine-Tuning Explained
description: Pre-training gives a model knowledge. Fine-tuning gives it a job. From full fine-tuning to LoRA and RLHF — how we adapt LLMs to specific tasks, visualized.
